title: hebe montana
intro: Hebe montana, also known as the New Zealand lavender or tree hebe, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It is a shrub that belongs to the hebe genus and is prized for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hebe montana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Hebe montana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
